sections.body: Caloric-restriction-mimetic research featured **spermidine** intake from food sources (wheat germ, aged cheese) associated with autophagy markers in a cohort study. Observational only — causation not established.

A crossover trial reported that **sprint-interval training** improved insulin sensitivity in premenopausal women after just three weeks. Caution advised for those new to high-intensity work — ramp volume gradually.
A usability study found **biofeedback-assisted training apps** improved adherence versus paper instructions, though clinical supervision still produced the best functional outcomes.

sources.title: Biofeedback apps for pelvic floor adherence

sections.body: A review of **integrative oncology** found exercise and dietary counseling improved quality of life during HER2+ treatment, used **alongside** standard therapy. No alternative monotherapy showed survival benefit.
Light-exposure research reinforced that **morning bright light** advances circadian phase and can reduce disjointed sleep for night owls. Aim for 10–20 minutes of outdoor light shortly after waking.

sources.title: Morning light exposure and circadian phase
